title: Indiana unemployment stays flat in June
description:
Indiana's unemployment rate remained unchanged at 3.3% in June. The Indiana Department of Workforce Development said Tuesday that the state added 1,800 private sector jobs compared to the previous month.

title: Indiana Michigan Power plans to build natural gas facility at Rockport site
description:
The new facility, dubbed the Rockport Energy Center, is "one of the largest utility construction undertakings in Indiana," according to the company, and would create up to 40 jobs.

title: Marion Health to cut ribbon on Family Medicine Residency Clinic
description:
The expanded clinic was established to allow the health system to bring its Family Medicine Residency Program to full capacity, with six new residents joining the program.

title: Voting begins for Indiana’s Ultimate Farmers Market Challenge
description:
Indiana Grown has opened voting for its fourth annual Indiana's Ultimate Farmers Market Challenge. The contest gives residents the opportunity to vote for their favorite hometown farmers markets.

title: State has no intent to restart summer food program for children
description:

title: Challenger drops recount of 14-vote GOP primary margin for state Sen. Liz Brown
description:
Darren Vogt submitted a petition Monday to the state Recount Commission to dismiss the recount request he filed May 19, two weeks after primary voting ended in what was a bitter campaign.
